title: Creating a MAGAZINE ISSUE with valid data
gherkin:
When the user creates a "MAGAZINE ISSUE" "Sieger-Typen" with the following data
  | key                    | value        |
  | title                  | Sieger-Typen |
  | consecutive_number     |              |
  | issue_number           | 11           |
  | issue_year             | 2025         |
  | release_date           | 2025-10-01   |
  | single_copy_price      | 5.4          |
  | single_copy_price_unit | EUR          |
  | pages                  | 148          |
Then the request should be confirmed with status code 201
And the response should return the "MAGAZINE ISSUE" "Sieger-Typen"
